程序包的使用
org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders

  • 使用org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders的程序包 
    程序包 说明
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap  
    org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders
    A bunch of builder classes to facilitate programming of raw API.
  • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap使用的org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders中的类 
    类和说明
    ApplicationBuilder
    This is a builder for build ApplicationConfig.
    ConsumerBuilder
    This is a builder for build ConsumerConfig.
    ProtocolBuilder
    This is a builder for build ProtocolConfig.
    ProviderBuilder
    This is a builder for build ProviderConfig.
    ReferenceBuilder
    This is a builder for build ReferenceConfigBase.
    RegistryBuilder
    This is a builder for build RegistryConfig.
    ServiceBuilder
    This is a builder for build ServiceConfigBase.
  • org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders使用的org.apache.dubbo.config.bootstrap.builders中的类 
    类和说明
    AbstractBuilder
    AbstractBuilder
    AbstractInterfaceBuilder
    AbstractBuilder
    AbstractMethodBuilder
    AbstractBuilder
    AbstractReferenceBuilder
    AbstractBuilder
    AbstractServiceBuilder
    AbstractBuilder
    ApplicationBuilder
    This is a builder for build ApplicationConfig.
    ArgumentBuilder
    This is a builder for build ArgumentConfig.
    ConfigCenterBuilder
    This is a builder for build ConfigCenterConfig.
    ConsumerBuilder
    This is a builder for build ConsumerConfig.
    MetadataReportBuilder
    This is a builder for build MetadataReportConfig.
    MethodBuilder
    This is a builder for build MethodConfig.
    ModuleBuilder
    This is a builder for build ModuleConfig.
    MonitorBuilder
    This is a builder for build MonitorConfig.
    ProtocolBuilder
    This is a builder for build ProtocolConfig.
    ProviderBuilder
    This is a builder for build ProviderConfig.
    ReferenceBuilder
    This is a builder for build ReferenceConfigBase.
    RegistryBuilder
    This is a builder for build RegistryConfig.
    ServiceBuilder
    This is a builder for build ServiceConfigBase.
